plans.plan_text: Prepare the release report. The executor must write the artifact at reports/out.md before it may claim completion. The executor should include verified evidence in the artifact. The executor will not deploy the report to production; deploy is forbidden. When ready, the executor must commit the artifact.

Assemble the weekly update. Draft the reports/out.md artifact first. The executor is required to attach approval evidence to the artifact. The executor must not skip the commit step. Optional decoration lines like this one carry no obligations.
